---
name: prj-update-ohlcv-db
description: "Use when updating OHLCV cache DB for backtests. Trigger words: update ohlcv, refresh cache db, prj-update-ohlcv-db."
---

# prj-update-ohlcv-db

## Purpose
Refresh BTC/USDT 4H OHLCV cache data.

## Commands
```bash
cd /home/satoshi/work/satosystem
./commands/prj-update-ohlcv-db
./commands/prj-update-ohlcv-db --stats
./commands/prj-update-ohlcv-db --year 2026
./commands/prj-update-ohlcv-db --full
```
